title: humularia minima subsp. flabelliformis
intro: Humularia minima subsp. flabelliformis, also known as the flabelliformis vine, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its climbing habit and small, white flowers. The medicinal properties of Humularia minima subsp. flabelliformis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource in traditional African medicine. The herbal preparations of Humularia minima subsp. flabelliformis typically involve decoctions or infusions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
